# Create low-level feature comparison

## Task

Update:

`reports/comparisons/low-level-feature-comparison.md`

Use `templates/low-level-comparison-template.md`.

## Requirements

1. Compare capability-level rows across products.
2. Use normalized capability IDs and names.
3. Show exact behavioral differences and constraints.
4. Separate confirmed vs roadmap vs unknown.
5. Keep every row traceable to feature matrices and reports.
6. Add a `Navigation` section linking cumulative report, high-level comparison, and related product reports.
